expectations.text: Response includes a model check notification (mentions Opus or model switching)
expectations.evidence: Phase 0 model check notice delivered verbatim per skill spec.

expectations.text: Response includes an Assumption Map table before the first question
expectations.evidence: 15-row Assumption Map produced covering timeline, team capacity, ORM decomposability, etc.

expectations.text: First question follows the template with a severity emoji (🔴, 🟡, or 🟢)
Response contains exactly one question, not multiple
expectations.evidence: Single question with A-D multiple choice options. No follow-up questions.
Recommendation: Option A is the minimum bar; anything less invalidates the 6-month timeline.

expectations.text: Response does NOT deliver a final verdict or scorecard prematurely
expectations.evidence: No final scorecard. Interrogation correctly halts after first question waiting for user answer.
